articles.title: SOM2在上海开幕，聚焦亚太数字化与互联互通合作
articles.summary: 2026 APEC第二次高官会（SOM2）于5月11日至19日在上海举行，重点讨论数据跨境流动规则协调、亚太数字基础设施互联互通等议题。

articles.title: APEC部长级圆桌会议在苏州召开，聚焦贸易便利化与供应链韧性
articles.summary: APEC部长级圆桌会议（MRT）于5月22日在苏州开幕，就全球经济不确定性下的供应链韧性与贸易便利化展开讨论。

articles.title: APEC moves forward on CBPR 2.0 framework for cross-border data flows
articles.summary: APEC economies advance negotiations on the upgraded Cross-Border Privacy Rules (CBPR 2.0) system, aiming to facilitate trusted data flows across the Asia-Pacific region.

articles.title: 新华网：APEC中国年推动亚太数字经济合作新篇章
articles.summary: 作为APEC 2026东道主，中国提出「建设亚太共同体」愿景，推动数字经济、人工智能治理等领域的区域合作。

articles.title: APEC AI governance framework gains traction amid US-China standards rivalry
articles.summary: APEC members debate competing AI governance models proposed by the US and China, seeking common ground on AI safety standards.

articles.title: APEC Data Privacy Subgroup advances work on cross-border data certification
articles.summary: The ECSG Data Privacy Subgroup reports progress on cross-border data transfer certification mechanisms during SOM2 meetings.

articles.title: APEC Supply Chain Connectivity Report warns of trade fragmentation risks
articles.summary: A new APEC report highlights growing risks to supply chain connectivity from geopolitical tensions and recommends enhanced regional cooperation.

articles.title: 外交部：中方在APEC推动数字经济与绿色发展双轮驱动
articles.summary: 外交部发言人在例行记者会上表示，作为APEC 2026东道主，中国推动数字经济与绿色发展双轮驱动，促进亚太地区可持续发展。
